steps.title: Identify what to evaluate
steps.content: We need to find the monthly fee for storing 40 containers, which means evaluating $f(40)$ using the given function $f(x) = 38x + 720$.

steps.title: Substitute x = 40 and calculate
steps.content:
Replace $x$ with 40 in the function:
$$f(40) = 38(40) + 720$$
Multiply first: $38 \times 40 = 1520$

Then add the constant term:
$$f(40) = 1520 + 720 = 2240$$
The answer is 2240.
